articles.description: India is overhauling its pharmaceutical storage rules to classify drugs as thermostable or thermolabile, enhancing handling standards for vaccines and insulin. dailyNews.title: Gabbard sends criminal referrals to DOJ for 2 officials linked to Trump impeachment

dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.description: President Trump said Wednesday that China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran. Phelim Kine, the China and Indo-Pacific Affairs correspondent at Politico, joins "The Daily Report" with more.

dailyNews.title: Thom Tillis opens up on which Cabinet secretaries are giving Trump bad advice

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans again block Democratic effort to end Trump's Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Senate Republicans voted down a resolution Wednesday pushed by Democrats to prohibit President Donald Trump from taking further military action in Iran

dailyNews.title: White House and DOJ separation changes under Trump

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo says world 'needs to hear' a message of peace
dailyNews.description: NBC News’ Claudio Lavanga shares an update from the pope’s trip to Africa, as the leader of the Catholic Church has been the target of recent Truth Social posts from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Tillis: AI Jesus photo ‘should have never been posted’
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis, a "lifelong" Catholic, told NBC News' Julie Tsirkin he believes President Trump should not view Pope Leo as a political leader and should not engage with him in that way.

dailyNews.title: Tillis encourages Trump to share details on Iran with Congress
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis tells NBC News' Julie Tsirkin that President Trump should share more information about the war with Iran to Congress to build "a case for why we have to have assets in the region."
